functions.title: Guide Book #63
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #63§r
§lSculk Walker§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Sculker, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: All deepslate underground.
•§lHealth§r: 42
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.27

•§lImmune to§r: Sculk Vibration, Warden Sensor.
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lPossible drops§r: Sculk, Sculk Vein, Sculk Sensor, Echo Shard, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Villagers, Player's aggressive

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘The Sculk Walker is a menacing, sculk-infested monster that roams the deepest underground, silent and deadly. Immune to sculk vibrations and Warden detection, it moves undisturbed through the darkness, striking down intruders with

§‘brutal melee force. Its twisted form drops valuable sculk materials and echo shards, making it both a threat and a reward to those who dare face it. Lurking where even sound holds its breath, the Sculk Walker is a relentless predator of the deep.
